title: Lead SEO Specialist at Puma India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Puma India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Puma India Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Puma India Capital India:
Puma India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India Capital India!
